source.name: OpenfMRI ds000115 participants.tsv
source.warning: The OpenfMRI dataset page warns that event files may be inaccurate. This summary uses participants.tsv behavioural columns rather than event TSV reconstruction.

extractor.name: participants-tsv-summary
extractor.method: Computed descriptive statistics from ds000115_R2.0.0 participants.tsv behavioural summary columns. No event-level files were parsed.

review.notes: Imported candidate statistics. Validate task-level construct mapping before using for public cohort comparisons.

dataset.population: Control sibling participants from ds000115 with condit=CON-SIB.
dataset.taskVariant: Letter 2-back behavioural summary columns from participants.tsv filtered to condit=CON-SIB.
dataset.notes: Candidate control-sibling subgroup summary from participants.tsv. Use only after construct and cohort mapping review.

metrics.label: Accuracy
metrics.method: Filtered to condit=CON-SIB. Subject-level 2-back accuracy is the unweighted mean of nback2_nont and nback2_targ because trial counts are not represented in participants.tsv.

distribution.notes: Equal-width bins computed from subject-level 2-back accuracy values in participants.tsv.

metrics.notes: Candidate 2-back accuracy summary derived from participants.tsv target and non-target accuracy columns.

metrics.label: Sensitivity d'
metrics.method: Filtered to condit=CON-SIB. Summary of d4prime values in participants.tsv after removing missing values.

distribution.notes: Equal-width bins computed from d4prime values in participants.tsv after excluding missing values.

metrics.notes: Candidate sensitivity summary from the source d4prime column; validate that d4prime aligns with Boundary's signal-detection definition before public comparisons.
